ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was collected */,
  "max_temp_f" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temp_f" INTEGER /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temp_f" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_dew_f" INTEGER /* Maximum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_dew_f" INTEGER /* Mean dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_dew_f" INTEGER /* Minimum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" INTEGER /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" INTEGER /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in inches */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "max_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Maximum visibility in miles */,
  "mean_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Mean visibility in miles */,
  "min_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Minimum visibility in miles */,
  "max_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "mean_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Mean wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "max_gust_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events or weather phenomena */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this weather data belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata for this dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES dataset_metadata ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., West Branch, Iowa, United States) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location whose data is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the temperature data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "max_temp_f" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temp_f" INTEGER /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temp_f" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the humidity data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" INTEGER /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" INTEGER /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the pressure data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in inches */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the visibility data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "max_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Maximum visibility in miles */,
  "mean_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Mean visibility in miles */,
  "min_visibility_miles" INTEGER /* Minimum visibility in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the wind data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "max_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "mean_wind_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Mean wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "max_gust_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the precipitation data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events or weather phenomena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata for this dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for this metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for this metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "search_query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed this search query */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query string */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when this search query was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "search_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query this result belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this result belongs to */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when this result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_search_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("search_query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported this data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this export belongs to */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when this data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when this log entry was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of this log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message for this log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when this notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message for this notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this preference belongs to */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for this preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value for this preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made this comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when this comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of this comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made this rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when this rating was made */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of this rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of this tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for this metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for this metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_metadata_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
